arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham says he felt like England scapegoat after Euro 2024
arts.sum: “I’ve got to be honest, I think I lost my smile a lot after the Euros when it came to playing for England because I felt like I was a little bit mistreated in comparison to what I contributed,” he said. Bellingham went to the Euros following a brilliant season with Madrid where he won the Spanish league title and the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot insists Mohamed Salah is 'not distracted' despite contraversial contract comments
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot insists Mohamed Salah is 'not distracted' despite his recent comments about his uncertain contract situation.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot: “Real Madrid always find different ways to win”
arts.sum: Liverpool coach Arne Slot talked about Real Madrid ’s ability to find ways to win games as his team prepared for the big clash on Wednesday. Slot talked about Madrid with a lot of respect, especially about them finding different ways to win football matches.

arts.ttl: Salah 'in a good place' at Liverpool despite contract impasse, says Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot believes Mohamed Salah is “in a good place” and isn’t affected by his contract impasse with the club. Salah’s latest deal expires at the end of this season and he told reporters after Liverpool’s 3-2 win at Southampton on Sunday that he was disappointed not to have received a new contract offer, saying: “I’m probably more out than in.”
